ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "full_text" TEXT /* Full text of the tweet */,
  "mask_sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the tweet regarding mask-wearing (Pro-Mask or Anti-Mask) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or hashtags associated with the tweet */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tweet was posted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "tweet_url" TEXT /* URL of the tweet */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been retweeted */,
  "favorite_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tweet has been favorited */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geolocation information (e.g., country, city) where the tweet was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being analyzed */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the tweet (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "sentiment_category" TEXT /* Category of the sentiment (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the sentiment analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_sentiments_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the hashtag is associated with */,
  "hashtag_text" TEXT /* Text of the hashtag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the hashtag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hashtags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the tweet */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the tweet was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the tweet */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent information (e.g., browser, device) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the entity was extracted from */,
  "entity_text" TEXT /* Text of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., keyword, phrase) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_entities_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet the topic was identified in */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "topic_score" REAL /* Score indicating the relevance of the topic to the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_topics_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)
